Blue robotic bomber. Specialize in defeating themed robot masters and stealing their weapons. My only weakness is touching sharp spikes, which instantly destroys me.
Intergalactic bounty hunter. Exploring hostile alien planets in a heavy power suit that frequently loses all its upgrades at the start of a mission. Known for turning into a small rolling sphere.
Former Tojo clan member. Spend my time aggressively ripping off my shirt, beating up street thugs with bicycles, and singing emotional karaoke. Highly involved in local real estate.
Amnesiac detective. Constantly arguing with the different voices in my own head while trying to solve a murder. Excellent at making terrible life choices and misplacing my badge.
Investigative journalist. Armed exclusively with a camcorder that constantly runs out of batteries. Specialize in hiding under beds and running in pure terror from asylum inmates.
Terrified castle explorer. Highly afraid of the dark. Must maintain my sanity while running from horrifying monsters that I cannot fight back against. Always out of lantern oil.
Best-selling thriller novelist. My writing keeps coming to life and attacking me. My greatest weapon is a flashlight with an incredibly short battery life. It's not a lake, it's an ocean.
Director of the FBC. Exploring a brutalist, shape-shifting government building. Skilled in throwing office furniture with my mind and using a gun that transforms. Things get very weird.
Gritty NYPD detective. Very skilled at diving sideways in ultra-slow motion while dual-wielding pistols. Heavy consumer of painkillers. My inner monologue is incredibly poetic and depressing.
Covert ops specialist. Easily recognizable by the three glowing green dots on my goggles. Specialize in hiding in the shadows, doing the splits between two walls, and interrogating guards.

Genetically enhanced assassin. Master of disguise. I travel the world infiltrating high-security events, often eliminating targets by dropping chandeliers or poisoning their drinks. Known simply as Agent 47.
Royal protector turned supernatural assassin. Framed for murder. I blink across rooftops, possess rats, and take revenge on a corrupt aristocracy in a plague-ridden city.
Vacationer in the wrong place. I get dropped into exotic locations run by charismatic, unhinged dictators. Highly skilled in taking over outposts, skinning badgers, and crafting bigger wallets.
Vigilante hacker. I walk around a modern city looking at my phone, causing massive traffic accidents by hacking traffic lights and draining random civilians' bank accounts with the press of a button.
Chaos specialist. Specialize in liberating islands by blowing up completely red-colored infrastructure. My grappling hook, parachute, and wingsuit defy all known laws of physics.
